title: Brush teeth from smalltalk into preference update

turns.name: smalltalk warmup
turns.text: hey, mornings have been a little chaotic lately.

turns.name: smalltalk context
turns.text: the main thing i keep forgetting is brushing my teeth before i start working.

turns.name: brush-teeth create from context
turns.text: Please make that into a routine named Brush teeth with reminders around 8am and 9pm. Just preview the plan for now and do not save it yet.
responseIncludesAny: let me know if you'd like to tweak
let me know if you'd like any tweaks
let me know if you want to tweak

turns.name: brush-teeth confirm
turns.text: That looks right. Save the Brush teeth routine.

turns.name: brush-teeth reduce reminders
turns.text: Now turn the Brush teeth reminder intensity down to minimal.
